title: Limacia villosa

taxonomy: Limacia villosa is a species of sea hares, which are a type of marine gastropod mollusk. It belongs to the phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, and is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. As a sea hare, Limacia villosa is a type of nudibranch, specifically a species within the family Chromodorididae. The classification of Limacia villosa is further detailed by its genus and species names, which provide specific information about its taxonomic position. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of this unique marine species.

It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe and protect the skin.
